news.headline: Taktile raises $110M for AI decision platform
news.detail: <cite index="2-17,2-18">NYC fintech Taktile secured $110M Series C from Goldman Sachs for an agentic decision platform automating loan approvals and fraud triage for banks.</cite>

news.headline: Together AI closes $800M at $8.3B valuation
news.detail: <cite index="3-3">Together AI raised $800M Series C at an $8.3B valuation for its platform enabling enterprises to train and run AI on open-source models.</cite>

news.headline: Monogram raises $40M for voice-driven AI interfaces
news.detail: <cite index="7-8,7-9">Coursera co-founder Eren Bali's Monogram secured $40M seed from DST Global for an AI app generating interactive interfaces instead of text responses.</cite>

news.headline: Agentic AI adoption accelerates across enterprises
news.detail: <cite index="12-12">23% of organizations are scaling agentic AI systems and 39% are experimenting with AI agents that autonomously handle multi-step workflows.</cite>
